from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class FileRecord:
    record: str = ''
    recno: int = 0
    updt: int = 0
    odo: int = 0
    pgm: str = ''
    lrecl: int = 0
    blksiz: int = 0
    lfil: int = 0
    org: str = ''
    lblr: int = 0
    reckey: int = 0
    end_of_key: int = 0
    altern_key: int = 0
    end_al_key: int = 0
    wrk_cs_09v00: int = 0
    eof_flag: int = 0
    records_in_error: int = 0
    perm_errors: int = 0
    status_test_00: int = 0
    status_test_10: int = 0
    status_test_read: int = 0
    count_of_recs: int = 0
    count_of_records: int = 0
    file_record_information_rec: int = 0
    file_record_info_skeleton: int = 0

def main() -> None:
    file_record = FileRecord()
    initialize_file_record(file_record)
    process_records(file_record)

def initialize_file_record(file_record: FileRecord) -> None:
    file_record.record = ' '
    file_record.recno = 0
    file_record.updt = 0
    file_record.odo = 0
    file_record.pgm = ' '
    file_record.lrecl = 0
    file_record.blksiz = 0
    file_record.lfil = 0
    file_record.org = ' '
    file_record.lblr = 0
    file_record.reckey = 0
    file_record.end_of_key = 0
    file_record.altern_key = 0
    file_record.end_al_key = 0
    file_record.wrk_cs_09v00 = 0
    file_record.eof_flag = 0
    file_record.records_in_error = 0
    file_record.perm_errors = 0
    file_record.status_test_00 = 0
    file_record.status_test_10 = 0
    file_record.status_test_read = 0
    file_record.count_of_recs = 0
    file_record.count_of_records = 0
    file_record.file_record_information_rec = 0
    file_record.file_record_info_skeleton = 0

def process_records(file_record: FileRecord) -> None:
    while not file_record.eof_flag:
        read_record(file_record)
        if file_record.status_test_read == 0:
            update_record(file_record)
        else:
            file_record.records_in_error += 1
            if file_record.records_in_error > 10:
                file_record.perm_errors += 1
                break

def read_record(file_record: FileRecord) -> None:
    file_record.status_test_read = 0

def update_record(file_record: FileRecord) -> None:
    file_record.count_of_recs += 1
    file_record.recno += 1
    file_record.record = f"Record {file_record.recno}"
    print(file_record.record)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
